title: vulpia myuros var. ciliata
intro: Vulpia myuros var. ciliata, also known as Squirrel-tail Fescue, is a type of grass-like plant belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Vulpia myuros var. ciliata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Vulpia myuros var. ciliata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
